Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Can we put Turban on Lord Rama?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2008-11-21 · 1 answers
once a devotee said that lord Rama wears turban sometimes in Ayodhya.
user [154] · 2008-11-28
If you go to Ayodhya you will see it. Is there anything that stops Rama wearing what He wants? In fact we worship Rama as a king, so to put turban on the king is not against that mood. I hope you are not suggesting that it does. Main point of worship is to please the Lord in his mood, not to be historically accurate.
